variants: Kaede Sakamoto is a dedicated landscape architect affiliated with the Peregrine Astrolabe Society. Under the mentoring of Shanil Karmali, she honed her skills and developed a passion for designing sustainable outdoor spaces. Her work has been supported by the Basilisk Inspiration Fund, which has recognized her innovative approach to landscape architecture. Additionally, she holds an Obsidian Smithing Certificate, showcasing her expertise in crafting structural elements that integrate seamlessly with nature. Kaede continues to make significant strides in her field, impacting both communities and ecosystems.
